content.en:
Void Zone.

Ye Tian sent back nine drops of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid and let the First True Body use it.

"I don't know what the effect of the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid is!"

Ye Tian swallowed a drop of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid in one gulp, and the energy of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid exploded, and the golden light covered Ye Tian completely.

At this time, he immediately hooked up with the Origin Cultivation of the Origin Realm Sea.

Even though he was in the thirteenth Boundary River, he still had no barrier to the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and he could directly and easily devour the origin energy of the Origin Realm Sea.

Rumble!!!!

A large amount of Origin Realm Sea energy poured into Ye Tian's body, refining his body.

And at this time, the power of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid eliminated the negative impact on Ye Tian's body, and the Origin of the Origin Realm Sea tried to assimilate Ye Tian's body, but the energy of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid canceled out this assimilation.

Of course, it is impossible to offset 100 percent, but it also offsets more than 90 out of 5, which is very unnatural.

If there is enough Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, then before becoming a Ten Realm-level controller, there is almost no need to worry about the degree of origin assimilation of the body, and you can directly absorb the origin energy of the Origin Realm Sea all the time.

"Sure enough, it's a good thing, the value is too high, but it's a pity that I only got nine drops of the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Such a good thing is rarely seen even at auctions, at least there was no treasure like the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid in the last auction.

Of course, for an existence like Shizun, such treasures are not uncommon, but they will not be given casually.

The Primal Ancestor had no apprentices, and he left the Origin Realm Sea directly, and he might not even plan to come back, so he left so much Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid and placed it inside the Primal Spiritual Mountain of the Primal Spiritual Mountain.

Otherwise, it would be impossible for Ye Tian, these Eternal Controllers, to obtain such a treasure easily!

Time passed slowly, and the nine drops of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid on Ye Tian's body were gradually used drop by drop.

Basically, one drop of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid could probably last for one million Realm River Years, and nine drops of the Primordial Spiritual Spring Liquid would be enough for Ye Tian to persist in cultivating nine million Realm River Years.

Ye Tian possessed the secret of devouring, and he had the physique of the Devouring Mountain, and he could quickly refine the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, so his nine million realm river years were equal to hundreds of millions of realm river years of others, or even billions of realm river years.

Therefore, Ye Tian could make great use of the value of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid.

Time flies, and finally, the nine drops of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid were completely exhausted by Ye Tian.

......

"Hahaha, it's very good, the origin assimilation of the body has hardly increased, but the body of control has improved a lot under the origin refining of the origin of the origin of the Origin Realm River, and the body has become extremely powerful!"

Ye Tian estimated that his strength had increased by about fifty percent, which was already a huge improvement.

At his level, almost every bit of strength he has to pay a huge price, and he has improved so much in such a short period of time, so he is naturally satisfied.

"The Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid of the Primal Spirit Mountain will not appear again for a long time, and I can't get other treasures that counteract the assimilation of the Origin for the time being, and the most promising way to greatly increase my strength at the moment is the Ten Thousand Phases Statue!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He had already gathered five statues of ten thousand phases, and if he had gathered four more, he would have made up nine.

Ye Tian didn't know who had the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, he only knew that the Black Immortal Senior Brother had gathered nine Ten Thousand Phases Statues, but he would definitely not give them to him.

There is also the rumored Ten Realms-level master Hei Zu, who must have also gathered the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, after all, many ordinary Eternal Controllers still think that the Ten Thousand Phases Statue is Hei Zu's!

"First issue a task in the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce, acquire the statue of Wanxiang, and the conditions can be discussed casually!"

Ye Tian decided.

As for whether he could buy it, he actually didn't have any hope at all, after all, everyone wanted to get together nine statues of ten thousand phases, but it was too difficult.

For example, some people have three or four statues of ten thousand phases in their hands, and it is impossible to take them out and trade them.

The reason why the master of the Xuantu took it out at the beginning was because he was in a bad situation and was about to fall, so he took out three statues of ten thousand phases.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce, issued this task, and then left.

Time passes slowly, and this task can only remain a task.

Unconsciously, tens of millions of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had almost forgotten the task of collecting the statue of Ten Thousand Phases.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating as usual, and suddenly received a message from the master of the Xuan Tu.

"Master of Xuantu, what is he looking for me?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

However, he still went to meet the master of the Xuantu.

......

Somewhere in the Origin Sea.

Ye Tian met with the master of Xuantu.

"I've seen the Endless Master!" said the Xuantu Master respectfully.

At this time, when the Xuantu controller saw Ye Tian, his mentality was also different.

Originally.

Both of them were Eight Realm-level controllers, so he almost looked at Ye Tian as a fellow Daoist, but now Ye Tian was a senior to him.

At the beginning, Ye Tiancai was a master of the Eight Realms, and it had only been a long time since he had the strength of a Nine Realms-level controller, and he was considered a strong one among the Nine Realm-level controllers.

When he heard about Ye Tian's achievements, he was also quite shocked.

After not seeing him for a short time, Ye Tian's strength was already far above him.

"Xuantu Master, what are you looking for me?" Ye Tian asked.

The Master of Xuantu immediately said, "Infinite Master, I heard that you are going to collect the Ten Thousand Phases Statue, so I came to you. "

"Didn't you get the Wanxiang Statue again?" Ye Tian was surprised.

"Naturally not. The Xuantu Controller smiled bitterly: "The Ten Thousand Phases Statue is also very precious to an eight-realm level controller like me, how can it be obtained casually." I didn't get the Statue of Ten Thousand Phases, but I did get a way to get it, so I'm here to tell the Infinite Master. "

"Oh, how?"

Ye Tian was really interested.

If he can gather the nine Ten Thousand Phases Statues, his strength can skyrocket!

The master of the Xuantu immediately said: "Endless controllers, there are not a few eternal masters with the statue of ten thousand phases in the Origin Realm Sea, most of them will not be traded, nor will they be revealed, unless they cannot be hidden, they will be exposed." It's like I had three statues of all phases before, and no one knew about them. This time, a good friend of mine is in trouble, he is stuck in a Jedi and needs the Nine Realms Masters to save him, and his clone promises to take out many treasures as a reward, including two statues of ten thousand faces. "

"What's the danger? I need to know about it!"

Ye Tian would not rashly agree because of the two statues of Ten Thousand Phases.
